transactions.description: A record of all financial transactions made by NatWest customers.

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the bank account from which the transaction was made.

amount.description: Transaction amount in GBP. Positive values represent credits, negative values represent debits.

tx_date.description: The date and time when the transaction was executed, in UTC.

merchant_name.description: The name of the business or entity where the transaction occurred.

accounts.description: Details of customer bank accounts including balances and account types.

account_id.description: Unique identifier for the bank account.

customer_id.description: Unique identifier for the customer who owns the account.

account_type.description: The type of the account. E.g., 'Checking', 'Savings'.

current_balance.description: The current available balance in the account in GBP.

customers.description: Personal and contact information for individual retail customers.

risk_profile.description: Assigned risk profile score: Low, Medium, High.

loans.description: Details about active and closed loans provided to customers.

customer_id.description: The customer who took the loan.

interest_rate.description: Annual Percentage Rate (APR) applied to the loan.

term_months.description: Duration of the loan in months.

credit_cards.description: Information on credit card products held by customers.

card_id.description: Unique system identifier for the credit card.

reward_points.description: Loyalty points accumulated on the card.

branches.description: Geographical and operational data for physical bank branches.

branch_id.description: Unique identifier for the bank branch.

branch_name.description: Name or location identifier of the branch.

manager_name.description: Name of the presiding branch manager.

employees.description: Records of bank personnel and their roles.

branch_id.description: Associated branch ID where the employee works.

hire_date.description: Date the employee joined the company.

mortgages.description: Long-term home loan details and property appraisals.

property_value.description: Assessed value of the underlying property.

fixed_rate_expiry.description: Date when the initial fixed interest rate expires.

investments.description: Customer portfolio details for wealth management and stocks.

portfolio_id.description: Unique identifier for the investment portfolio.

asset_class.description: Type of investment (Equities, Bonds, Mutual Funds).

total_value.description: Current market value of the investments.

audit_logs.description: System logs for tracking data access and security events.

log_id.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

event_type.description: Type of event (e.g., Login, Query, Export).

user_id.description: ID of the employee or customer triggering the event.

ip_address.description: IP address from where the request originated.
